name: PomHub Dev Production Deployment Fixes
objective: Fix 5 production deployment issues: kill duplicate host Node process, reset vm.max_map_count, fix entrypoint echo messages, optimize Dockerfile, configure nginx reverse proxy
exit_criteria: No duplicate Node.js process running outside Docker
Entrypoint echo messages accurately describe PomHub production server
Docker image size reduced by stripping devDependencies
nginx serves as reverse proxy on port 80 to Docker on port 4321
